title: 4PCS Spiral Hair Ties Set - Heart Design Telephone Wire Hair Bands, No Damage Elastic Coil Scrunchies for Women & Girls, Ponytail Holders for Wedding Birthday Party Daily Hair Accessories
features: Gentle & Stylish Hair Solution: MOTIBACK's telephone cord hair ties are crafted from ultra-soft rubber and lightweight alloy, ensuring zero damage to your hair. These spiral hair ties for women glide effortlessly through thick or fine hair, preventing breakage and tangles. Perfect for daily use, workouts, or special occasions, they keep your ponytail wrap secure without leaving creases.

Effortless Styling in Seconds: Simply align the telephone wire hair bands with your ponytail root, twist, just get it done! The elastic spiral hair ties adapt to any hair thickness, offering a snug yet comfortable hold. Ideal for spiral hair ties for thick hair, they stay put during yoga, running, or a busy workday.

Vibrant & Versatile Collection: Each pack includes 4 phone cord hair ties in trendy colours (Smudged grey, apricot, beige and coffee), adorned with chic heart charms. Mix and match these coil hair ties for women to complement your outfit or mood—whether for a wedding, party, or casual day out.

Compact & Travel-Friendly: At just 3.35 inches, these hair spiral ties fit neatly in pockets or purses. Their no damage soft elastic spiral hair ties design ensures durability, resisting fade and stretch loss. A must-have for on-the-go touch-ups!

Thoughtful Gift for Hair Lovers: Surprise friends or family with these hair tie sets! Loved for their hair ties spiral no damage feature, they’re a practical yet stylish upgrade from traditional bands. Perfect for birthdays, holidays, or "just because" gifting.
description: Style Meets Hair-Friendly Function The MOTIBACK Spiral Hair Tie Collection combines cute aesthetics with practical design. The telephone wire structure distributes pressure evenly, while the heart-shaped coils add flair to any hairstyle—from messy buns to elegant wraps. Why These Stand Out: Versatile Fit: Expands for thick ponytails yet grips fine hair securely Travel-Ready: Lightweight and tangle-free in bags All-Day Comfort: Soft resin material won’t pull or snag Perfect For: Athletes needing spiral hair ties for workouts Bridesmaids wanting wedding-appropriate hair accessories Parents seeking no damage hair ties for kids Package Includes: Smudged grey, Smudged apricot, Smudged beige and Smudged coffee 4 color Spiral Hair Ties (8.5cm each)
